name: Green Glow Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients (cake and pudding mixes) and mix well.
2. Add the wet ingredients (club soda, vegetable oil, and eggs) to the dry mixture. Mix until just combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased glass fluted cake pan that has been covered with sugar.
4. Bake on full power for 13-14 minutes, turning the pan every 4 minutes if necessary to ensure even cooking.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan before removing it.
6. To make the icing, combine the pudding mix, milk, and whipped topping mix ingredients in a bowl. Mix until smooth.
7. Frost the cooled cake with the prepared icing.
8. Store the cake in the refrigerator.
